caption: 5:15 AM, Crestwood South loop. The coldest mile is always the first one. #morningrun #birmingham
Saturday long run in before the sun. 9 miles, legs felt good. #longrun #runchat
Smoker's going. Ribs low and slow, the way I learned watching Pop. #bbq #birmingham
Three new names on the team PR board this week. Proud of these kids. #crestwoodtrack #ahsaa
Sunday best. New Hope AME. #gospel #sundayservice
Relay handoffs looked clean at practice today. 4x100 is coming together. #track #sprints
Tempo run done. Negative split, barely. #running #trainingblock
Crestwood XC Invitational at Oak Mountain. Cold morning, fast course. #crosscountry #oakmountain
Meet day. Bus rolls at 6. Let's work. #meetday #crestwoodtrack
Iron City Sports Medicine charity 5K in the books. Good cause, good people. #charity5k #birmingham
Sunday dinner at Mama's. Smothered chicken and cornbread, non-negotiable. #sundaydinner #soulfood
Foam roller and film. The least glamorous part of the job, and the most important. #sportspt #recovery
Men's choir rehearsal ran long. Worth every minute. #menschoir #newhopeame
Cooldown miles with the distance crew. Birmingham Track Club Saturday. #birminghamtrackclub #cooldown
Race week. The taper always feels like lying to your legs. #mercedesmarathon #halfmarathon
Grill's clean, cooler's stocked. Roll Tide, football's on. #rolltide #alabamafootball
Track was wet but we got the work in. No excuses. #crestwoodtrack #sprintmechanics
8 miles, 6 AM, 42 degrees. Best part of my day. #morningrun #milesmatter
Banquet prep. These athletes earned the spotlight. #crestwoodtrack #banquet
Peach cobbler I couldn't refuse. Thank you, Mama. #soulfood #sundaydinner
Devon broke 11 in the 100 today. The work is showing. Stay humble, stay hungry. #d1prospect #sprints
Watch Night service into the new year. Grateful. #watchnight #newhopeame
Brisket and pulled pork for the watch party. Dr Pepper sauce going on everything. #grilling #bbq
Season opener at Crestwood. New uniforms, new PRs, same standard. #seasonopener #crestwoodtrack
